query:
-- Supprimer les territoires orphelins (partenaire 60016 supprimé)
DELETE FROM partner_territories 
WHERE partnerId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM partners);

-- Vérifier qu'il n'y a plus de territoires orphelins
SELECT COUNT(*) as orphanCount
FROM partner_territories pt
LEFT JOIN partners p ON p.id = pt.partnerId
WHERE p.id IS NULL;
